plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Xpirit uses your location to track live runs, pace, distance, and duration.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Xpirit keeps tracking your run when the screen is locked.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Xpirit uses your location while you track a run.

plugins.photosPermission: Xpirit needs access to your photos so you can pick a background for your shared report.
plugins.cameraPermission: Xpirit needs access to your camera so you can take a new photo for your shared report.
